name: Saucy Chicken and Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 ounce can cream of chicken soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions: If desired, partially cook asparagus. Drain and place in a greased, 9-inch square baking dish. Brown the chicken in a skillet over medium heat on both sides. Season with salt and pepper. Arrange the chicken over the asparagus. In a bowl, mix together the soup, mayonnaise, lemon juice, and curry powder. Pour over the chicken. Cover and bake at 375°F for 40 minutes or until the chicken is tender and juices run clear. Sprinkle with cheese. Let stand for 5 minutes.
